---
name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve SecuScan
title: '[BUG] '
labels: type:bug, priority:medium
assignees: ''

---

## Summary

Describe the bug in 1-3 sentences.

## Why this matters

Explain the user-facing or contributor-facing impact.

## Reproduction steps

List the exact steps needed to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## Expected behavior

Describe what should have happened instead.

## Actual behavior

Describe what happened, including error messages or incorrect output.

## Scope

If you already know the likely area, mention it here:

- Suggested files or directories:
- Related route, page, component, or script:

## Evidence

If applicable, add logs, screenshots, stack traces, terminal output, or network responses.

## Environment

Please complete the following information:
 - OS: [e.g. macOS]
 - Browser [e.g. Chrome, Safari]
 - Python Version: [e.g. 3.11]
 - Node Version: [e.g. 20]
 - Docker Version: [e.g. 24]

## Definition of done

Use this section if you already know what a complete fix should include:

- [ ] Bug is reproducible from the issue description
- [ ] Root cause is fixed
- [ ] Relevant tests are added or updated
- [ ] Docs are updated if setup or behavior changed

## Additional context

Add any other context here.
